title: Miss Molly And The Little Fishes.
content:
Oh, sweet Miss Molly,
    You're so fond
    Of Fishes in a little Pond.
    And perhaps they're glad
    To see you stare
    With such bright eyes
    Upon them there.
    And when your fingers and your thumbs
    Drop slowly in the small white crumbs
    I hope they're happy. Only this 
    When you've looked long enough, sweet miss.
    Then, most beneficent young giver,
    Restore them to their native river.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Kate Greenaway delivers a powerful performance in "Miss Molly And The Little Fishes."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
